keyPoints: Hadoop Overview: Hadoop is an open-source, distributed computing framework written in Java.
Use Cases: Hadoop is used in data warehousing, data lakes, and real-time analytics.
HDFS: Hadoop Distributed File System is a fault-tolerant and scalable file system.
Processing Data: Hadoop processes data using MapReduce, a programming model and software framework.
Managing Resources: Hadoop manages resources using YARN (Yet Another Resource Negotiator) and impala.
